name: SALTO Systems KS Cloud Access Control API
what_it_does: SALTO Systems KS (Keys as a Service) cloud access control REST API for hospitality operators, co-working space managers, and property technology integrators to manage electronic lock credentials, user access groups, access schedules, and entry event monitoring across SALTO's wire-free electronic lock hardware — enabling HRIS-driven credential provisioning, guest access management, and multi-property physical security through SALTO's cloud platform. Enables AI agents to manage user credential for keycard and mobile access provisioning automation, handle access group for role-based lock permission management automation, access entry log for security audit trail automation, retrieve lock inventory for hardware management automation, manage schedule for time-based access policy automation, handle guest access for hospitality checkout integration automation, access remote opening for contactless entry automation, retrieve SALTO Space for enterprise building management automation, manage PIN code for backup credential automation, and integrate SALTO KS with PMS, HRIS, and co-working platforms for end-to-end lock management automation.
use_cases: Managing hotel guest room access credentials integrated with PMS for hospitality checkout automation agents
Provisioning co-working member access through HRIS for flexible office management automation agents
Monitoring door entry events and lock audit trails for security compliance automation agents
Integrating SALTO KS with property management platforms for multi-site access control automation agents
not_for: High-security government facilities requiring FIPS 201 PIV compliance (SALTO KS is commercial grade)
Consumer residential smart locks (SALTO is commercial/institutional access control)
IP camera and video surveillance management (SALTO is lock-only, not full physical security suite)
best_when: A hospitality operator, co-working space, or property technology integrator wanting AI agents to manage SALTO KS wire-free electronic lock credentials, guest access, and entry event monitoring across commercial properties.
avoid_when: SALTO KS VS SALTO SPACE: SALTO offers two platforms — SALTO KS (cloud SaaS) and SALTO Space (on-premises); automated unified API assumption creates two different integration paths; automated must target correct platform (KS for cloud, Space for on-prem). WIRE-FREE HARDWARE REQUIRED: SALTO KS uses SALTO wire-free electronic lock hardware; automated generic lock hardware assumption creates hardware incompatibility; automated must have SALTO-brand lock hardware installed at each access point. HOSPITALITY REQUIRES PMS INTEGRATION CONTEXT: Hotel guest access workflows require PMS check-in/check-out trigger integration; automated standalone credential management assumption creates orphaned guest credentials; automated hospitality deployment must integrate with PMS checkout events. CREDENTIAL FORMAT VARIES BY LOCK MODEL: Different SALTO lock models support different credential types (RFID, BLE, PIN, NFC); automated universal credential format assumption creates unsupported_credential_type; automated must check lock model capabilities before credential provisioning.

auth.notes: SALTO KS uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Oiartzun, Spain HQ (Basque Country). Founded 1994. Products: SALTO KS (cloud), SALTO Space (on-prem), SVN (SALTO Virtual Network), RFID/BLE/NFC credentials, mobile key, PIN code locks. SDKs: None public. Hospitality, co-working, healthcare, education verticals. 10M+ locks installed globally. GDPR, ISO 27001. Competes with Dormakaba and ASSA ABLOY for electronic access control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer sandbox for approved partners; production requires SALTO partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-site subscription; pricing through SALTO authorized resellers; hardware cost separate
pricing.notes: Oiartzun ES. Per-site subscription. Hardware required. GDPR, ISO 27001. Global reseller network.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; credential and access APIs throttled; webhooks for lock events

known_agent_gotchas: SALTO KS VS SPACE ARE DIFFERENT PLATFORMS: SALTO KS (cloud) and SALTO Space (on-premises) have different APIs and workflows; automated platform-agnostic assumption creates wrong API endpoints; automated must determine if target site uses SALTO KS or SALTO Space before integration

SALTO HARDWARE IS REQUIRED: SALTO KS manages SALTO-brand wire-free electronic locks only; automated generic door lock control assumption creates hardware incompatibility; automated must have SALTO lock hardware installed at each door

HOSPITALITY PMS CHECKOUT INTEGRATION: Hotel guest access requires PMS check-in trigger to provision credentials and check-out trigger to revoke; automated standalone credential lifecycle assumption creates orphaned guest access; automated must integrate PMS events with SALTO KS credential lifecycle

LOCK MODEL DETERMINES CREDENTIAL TYPES: Different SALTO lock models support different credential formats; automated universal credential provisioning creates unsupported_credential_type on incompatible locks; automated must query lock model capabilities before provisioning

PARTNER RESELLER ACCESS REQUIRED: SALTO API access is distributed through authorized resellers; automated direct SALTO API account assumption may require reseller intermediary; automated should work through SALTO authorized reseller for API credentials
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial electronic access control. GDPR, ISO 27001. OAuth2. EU/ES. Physical access and facility entry data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Commercial access control. GDPR, ISO 27001. OAuth2. EU. Physical access and entry data.
